reservation.source_phrase: Space is limited—advance tickets are strongly recommended.
reservation.source_block:
ARRIVAL & ENTRY

Shows begin at 15 minutes past each hour, starting at 10:15 AM.

Space is limited—advance tickets are strongly recommended.

Please arrive at the Old South Meeting House 15-20 minutes before your showtime.

Late entry is not permitted more than 5 minutes after the show begins.

hours.source_phrase: Revolutionary Spaces is conveniently open seven days per week from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM unless otherwise noted.
hours.source_block:
Museum Hours

Revolutionary Spaces is conveniently open seven days per week from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM unless otherwise noted. Click the button below for up-to-date information on hours and building closures.
